scripts.dev: PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.21.1/bin:$PATH" sh -c 'kill-port 3000 5174 || true; sleep 1; concurrently -n API,WEB -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"'
scripts.bootstrap: npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
